Amplify ETFs Launches the Amplify XRP 3% Monthly Premium Income ETF (XRPM)

overview.description: The Amplify XRP 3% Monthly Premium Income ETF (XRPM) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in long xrp, short usd currency. The fund seeks exposure to the price return of XRP while generating income through covered call strategy on XRP ETPs. The actively managed fund targets annualized option premiums of 36% and aims to pay distributions monthly XRPM was launched on Nov 18, 2025 and is issued by Amplify Investments.
